codeReview.summary: The fix removes the heavy SpriteGenerator module import from the timeout-prone test block and replaces it with direct drawer imports that still validate the required texture-key contracts. This addresses the test-timeout root cause without changing production code.

summary: Review passed: commit 4e87ed5 rewrites the slow SpriteBlocksAndMerchant tests to use lightweight drawer imports, keeping coverage on the required texture-key contracts while eliminating the timeout source.
